title: Peacock parity
tagline: Per-project color identity — the workflow Peacock pioneered, native to JetBrains.

slides.title: Per-project color, on by default
slides.body: If you've ever ran VS Code with Peacock, you know the moment: three IDE windows on three monitors, and a glance tells you which is which. Ayu Islands brings that workflow to JetBrains — built on the platform's primitives, not ported. Inspired by Peacock for VS Code (johnpapa.net).

slides.title: And what we did natively
slides.body: WCAG-aware foreground keeps text readable on any saturated accent. Per-language pins bind a color to a language so the IDE follows your file. Live chrome refresh keeps rotation, theme sync, CodeGlance, and Indent Rainbow in step — no reload. Thank you, John Papa. The workflow is alive in JetBrains. (Peacock: github.com/johnpapa/vscode-peacock)
